description: Sample relative displacement or force from a single degree-of-freedom in a structural element link.

6.0.description: Samples relative displacement or force from a single degree-of-freedom in a structural element link.

keywords.name: displacement-x
keywords.description: relative displacement in the local x degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: displacement-y
keywords.description: relative displacement in the local y degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: displacement-z
keywords.description: relative displacement in the local z degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: displacement-rotational-x
keywords.description: relative angular displacement in the local x degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: displacement-rotational-y
keywords.description: relative angular displacement in the local y degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: displacement-rotational-z
keywords.description: relative angular displacement in the local z degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: force-x
keywords.description: force in the local x degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: force-y
keywords.description: force in the local y degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: force-z
keywords.description: force in the local z degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: moment-x
keywords.description: moment in the local x degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: moment-y
keywords.description: moment in the local y degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: moment-z
keywords.description: moment in the local z degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: component-id
keywords.description: the particular link is identified by the component ID number. If this keyword is used position should not be used.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: the particular link is identified by (v) coordinates (the nearest node is taken). If this keyword is used, component-id should not be used.

keywords.name: side
keywords.description: specifies which side of the node indicated in position should be used to find the link. By default, side 1 is used.
